holdings.infoBox: GGUS is an equity ETF with a total of 387 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.76%, Apple at 10.62%, Microsoft at 4.08%, Broadcom at 3.74%, and Tesla at 3.73%.

overview.description: The Marketbeta Russell 1000 Growth Equity ETF (GGUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap stocks selected from the Russell 1000 Index with the highest growth characteristics based on Russells style methodology. GGUS was launched on Nov 28, 2023 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
